description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the itxtech/docker-env-genisys Docker image and runs a before_script to update git submodules recursively. Define a single stage named package and a job called phar in that stage. The phar job executes the following shell commands in order: sed -i "s/const VERSION \?= \?\"\(.*\)\"/const VERSION = \"\1$([ ${CI_BUILD_REF_NAME} != master ] && echo unsupported-)${CI_BUILD_REF:0:7}\"/" src/pocketmine/PocketMine.php, sed -i "/GIT_COMMIT/s/0000000000000000000000000000000000000000/${CI_BUILD_REF}/" src/pocketmine/PocketMine.php, ./tests/travis.sh, and mv plugins/DevTools/Genisys*.phar .; finally upload any Genisys*.phar files as artifacts.
